title: acalypha macrostachya f. macrophylla
intro: Acalypha macrostachya f. macrophylla, also known as the Large-stalked Copperleaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as using it as a natural remedy for wounds and cuts. In herbal preparations, Acalypha macrostachya f. macrophylla can be made into a tea, infusion, or poultice to extract its medicinal compounds.
